home.title: BarberLaki
home.description: Your hair, our passion. Book your appointment now and experience the best haircut of your life.

haircut.description: Precision cutting tailored to your face shape and personal style.

beardTrim.description: Expert beard shaping and grooming for a clean, refined finish.

combo.description: The full treatment — a fresh haircut and a sharp beard trim in one visit.

scissorsHaircut.description: A haircut done entirely with scissors — for a soft, natural, precise finish.

oneLengthClipper.description: A single clipper guard all over — a clean, uniform look.

about.body1: Every cut gets full attention — from the first consultation to the final detail. Classic and modern techniques, tailored to you.
about.body2: At BarberLaki, a great haircut is more than a service — it's an experience.

footer.tagline: Your hair, our passion. Premium grooming for the modern gentleman.

booking.title: Book Your Appointment
booking.success: Success! Your appointment is confirmed for {{date}} at {{time}}.
booking.validationFailed: Validation failed. Please check your input.
booking.timeSlotBooked: This time slot is already booked. Please choose another time.
booking.timeUnavailable: That time is no longer available. Please pick another time.
booking.dayUnavailable: This day is unavailable for booking. Please choose another date.
booking.errorOccurred: An error occurred: {{message}} Please try again.
booking.serverConfigError: Server configuration error. Could not send emails.
booking.criticalError: A critical server error occurred and we could not fully save your booking. Please contact us directly.

admin.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?

schedule.title: Manage Schedule
schedule.bookingWindow: Booking Window (How far ahead can customers book?)
schedule.breakInvalid: Break end must be after its start.

timeOff.title: Time Off
timeOff.subtitle: Block off part of a specific day. Existing bookings are kept.
timeOff.invalid: End time must be after start time.
timeOff.error: Failed to save. Please try again.
timeOff.overlapWarning: {count} existing booking(s) fall in this window — they will be kept.
timeOff.rangeInvalid: The end date must be on or after the start date.
timeOff.vacationOverlap: {count} existing appointment(s) fall within this vacation — they will be kept.

blockNow.title: Block time from now
blockNow.closedToday: You're not open today, so there's nothing to block.
blockNow.error: Failed to block time. Please try again.
blockNow.overlapWarning: {count} existing booking(s) fall in this window — they will be kept.
